note: Plan-review framing respected; no false positives.

issues.title: Idempotency only explicit for submit; other mutators underspecified
issues.resolution: Idempotency matrix added covering every mutator + scheduler; outbox dedupe_key backstop via Migration 0141.

issues.title: Scheduler tx composition ambiguous (nested tx risk)
issues.resolution: Task 5.7 rewritten: short claim tx (READ COMMITTED, SKIP LOCKED, mark 'publishing') + per-row transition tx via RunInMembershipTx. Intermediate status added to Migration 0141.

issues.title: Event payload contracts not defined
issues.resolution: Per-event required-keys table added (12 event types). domain.ValidateEventPayload + events.BuildDedupeKey helpers in Task 5.1.

issues.title: Transition matrix incomplete
issues.resolution: Per-method allowed/from/to/error matrix added. Terminal-state writes unconditionally ErrIllegalTransition.

issues.title: Signoff uniqueness not explicit
issues.resolution: UNIQUE (stage_instance_id, actor_user_id) added to Migration 0141 (stage-scoped, tighter than Phase 1 instance-scoped). Service replay rule references Phase 4 F2 4-tuple.

issues.title: Obsolete cascade traversal/locking unspecified
issues.resolution: BFS, sorted-by-child-ID lock order, visited-set cycle break, 1000-node depth bound, per-node events with dedupe_key.

issues.title: Legacy cutover relies only on grep
issues.resolution: Added staticcheck + DI container reflect test + integration probe 5.11-G scanning routes/cron.

action_taken: All 7 fixes applied inline. Upgrade_required satisfied via structural additions (matrix, idempotency, scheduler rewrite). Migration 0141 added as Phase-1 amendment. Round 2 skipped — findings enumerable and directly addressed.
